name: Baluk Plakki
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fish as for broiling. Rub the inside and outside of each fillet with oil and salt lightly.
2. Broil under low heat until the inner side is browned. Then turn off the broiler and brown the outer side.
3. Place the fish in a long baking dish, covered with sliced onions and tomatoes. Sprinkle lightly with salt.
4. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
5. Add 1 cup boiling water and baste. Bake an additional 5 to 10 minutes longer.
6. Serve either hot or cold, garnished with parsley and/or fresh mint. Wedges of lemon may be added.
